STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_PLANT_POWER.title: Planting

STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_STRESS_POWER.title: Stress
STS2_WINE_FOX_POWER_STRESS_POWER.descrip: When you gain materials from [gold]cards[/gold], only [blue]1[/blue] stack is spent for that resolution, doubling the materials gained (powers, relics, and other non-card sources do not count).
